commands.review_summary:
The branch adds abort-controller plumbing for Gmail watcher restarts triggered by config hot reload, stops the config reloader before the Gmail watcher during shutdown, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows config hot reload starts the Gmail watcher without a cancellation signal and stops the config reloader after the Gmail watcher during shutdown; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
